/usr/bin/ar qc libMinimumTracer.a CMakeFiles/MinimumTracer.dir/minimum_tracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinimumTracer.dir/__/minimizer/MinimizeGSL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinimumTracer.dir/__/minimizer/Minimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinimumTracer.dir/__/minimizer/MinimizePlane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinimumTracer.dir/__/minimizer/LibNLOPT/MinimizeNLOPT.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libMinimumTracer.a
